title: Xero webhook verification failure
symptom: When attempting to verify a webhook in Xero, the response indicates '401 unsigned or 2xx not valid'. This prevents successful verification of the webhook.
not_this_if: Webhook flow is active and properly configured
root_cause: The error occurs because the webhook verification process requires the flow to be active. If the flow is off, Xero cannot validate the request, leading to a 401 error or invalid response.
fix_steps: Activate the webhook flow in n8n
Send a test request from Xero to verify the webhook
Check the response to ensure it is valid
agent_instruction: Activate the Xero webhook flow and send a test request from Xero.
